headline: Assessing NetApp (NTAP) Valuation After New Google Cloud AI Data Services Unveiled
summary: NetApp (NTAP) is back in focus after using Google Cloud Next 2026 to introduce AI focused data services with Google Cloud NetApp Volumes, aimed at running enterprise and AI workloads without large scale rearchitecture. See our latest analysis for NetApp. The recent announcements with Google Cloud arrive as momentum has been building, with a 30 day share price return of 9.84% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 23.74% supporting a stronger multi year track record. If you are looking...
